class.name: ASTagUtils
class.brief_description: Utility functions for tag type validation, creation, and historical queries.
class.description:
ASTagUtils provides comprehensive helper functions for working with Ability System tags. Includes type validation, automatic type detection from naming conventions, factory methods, and powerful historical query APIs for all three tag types.
Features three specialized historical namespaces: - NameHistory: Queries for NAME tags (State.Stunned, Class.Warrior) - ConditionalHistory: Queries for CONDITIONAL tags (Can.Parried, Immune.Fire) - EventHistory: Enhanced queries for EVENT tags (Event.Damage, Event.Ability.Activated) - UnifiedHistory: Cross-type queries and debug utilities
These utilities follow the BUSINESS_RULES.md conventions for tag naming and help maintain type safety across the system with full historical tracking.

method.name: cond_count_additions
method.description: Counts how many times a specific [constant CONDITIONAL] tag was added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_count_removals
method.description: Counts how many times a specific [constant CONDITIONAL] tag was removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_get_recent_additions
method.description: Returns an array of conditional tag names that were added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_get_recent_changes
method.description: Returns an array of all conditional tag events (additions and removals) that occurred within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_get_recent_removals
method.description: Returns an array of conditional tag names that were removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_had_tag
method.description: Returns true if the target had the specified conditional tag at any point during the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_was_tag_added
method.description: Returns true if the specified conditional tag was added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: cond_was_tag_removed
method.description: Returns true if the specified conditional tag was removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: detect_tag_type
method.description: Detects tag type from naming convention. Event.* -> EVENT, Can.* or Immune.* -> CONDITIONAL, others -> NAME.

method.name: event_count_occurrences
method.description: Returns the number of times the specified event occurred on the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: event_did_occur
method.description: Returns true if the specified event occurred on the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: event_get_all_recent_events
method.description: Returns a list of all event entries that occurred on the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: event_get_last_data
method.description: Retrieves the data payload from the most recent occurrence of the specified event tag.

method.name: event_get_last_instigator
method.description: Retrieves the instigator node from the most recent occurrence of the specified event tag.

method.name: event_get_last_magnitude
method.description: Retrieves the magnitude value from the most recent occurrence of the specified event tag.

method.name: event_get_recent_events
method.description: Returns a list of recent entries for a specific event tag on the target.

method.name: history_dump
method.description: Prints a formatted debug log of all historical entries for the target to the console.

method.name: history_get_all_changes
method.description: Returns a combined array of all Name and Conditional tag changes within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: history_get_tag_history
method.description: Returns all historical entries (timeline) for a specific tag on the target.

method.name: history_get_total_size
method.description: Returns the combined number of entries across all historical buffers for the target.

method.name: history_was_tag_present
method.description: General purpose query to check if any version of the specified tag was present at any point within the target's historical buffers.

method.name: is_can_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "Can.".

method.name: is_class_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "Class.".

method.name: is_event_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "Event.".

method.name: is_immune_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "Immune.".

method.name: is_state_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "State.".

method.name: is_team_tag
method.description: Returns true if tag name starts with "Team.".

method.name: name_count_additions
method.description: Counts how many times a specific [constant NAME] tag was added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_count_removals
method.description: Counts how many times a specific [constant NAME] tag was removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_get_recent_additions
method.description: Returns an array of name tag identifiers that were added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_get_recent_changes
method.description: Returns an array of all name tag events (additions and removals) that occurred within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_get_recent_removals
method.description: Returns an array of name tag identifiers that were removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_had_tag
method.description: Returns true if the target had the specified name tag at any point during the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_was_tag_added
method.description: Returns true if the specified name tag was added to the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: name_was_tag_removed
method.description: Returns true if the specified name tag was removed from the target within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds.

method.name: validate_tag_type
method.description: Validates that a tag exists and matches the expected type. Returns false if tag doesn't exist or type doesn't match.

constants.constant: A standard identity tag for classes, states, or teams (e.g., State.Stunned).
A dynamic conditional tag with duration and magnitude support (e.g., Can.Attack).
A high-frequency ephemeral tag with payload support (e.g., Event.Damage).
